Our Story

The Art of Flame Grilling

Since 1954, Burger King has been flame-grilling burgers with real fire. It is not a gimmick — it is our heritage. That smoky, charred perfection you taste? That is 70 years of craft.

Every burger is made-to-order using 100% halal beef with no fillers, no preservatives. Fresh vegetables. Real ingredients. Your way, every time. Proudly serving Ghana.

100%
Halal Certified
0
Artificial Preservatives
70+
Years of Grilling
18k+
Locations Worldwide
BK Royals
Earn Points, Eat Free

Join BK Royals and get rewarded every time you order. The more you eat, the more you earn.

Sign Up Free

Create your BK Royals account in 30 seconds. No card required.

3

Redeem Rewards

Cash in points for free food, upgrades, and exclusive member deals.
